Bash(cd /c/Users/jacki/AndroidStudioProjects/anchorage && python -c "
import urllib.request
import sys

url = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/StevenBlack/hosts/master/alternates/porn/hosts'
print\(f'Downloading from {url}...'\)
response = urllib.request.urlopen\(url, timeout=60\)
raw = response.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)
lines = raw.splitlines\(\)
domains = []
for line in lines:
    line = line.strip\(\)
    if line.startswith\('0.0.0.0 '\):
        parts = line.split\(\)
        if len\(parts\) >= 2:
            domain = parts[1]
            if domain != '0.0.0.0' and not domain.startswith\('localhost'\):
                domains.append\(domain\)

out_path = 'android/app/src/main/assets/blocklist.txt'
with open\(out_path, 'w', newline='\\n'\) as f:
    for d in domains:
        f.write\(d + '\\n'\)

print\(f'Written {len\(domains\)} domains to {out_path}'\)

# Verify no ad/tracker domains
test_domains = ['taboola.com', 'doubleclick.net', 'googlesyndication.com', 'googleadservices.com', 'facebook.com']
domain_set = set\(domains\)
for td in test_domains:
    found = td in domain_set
    print\(f'  {td}: {\\"FOUND \(BAD\)\\" if found else \\"not found \(good\)\\"}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/jacki/AndroidStudioProjects/anchorage && python -c "
import urllib.request

url = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/StevenBlack/hosts/master/alternates/porn-only/hosts'
print\(f'Downloading from {url}...'\)
response = urllib.request.urlopen\(url, timeout=60\)
raw = response.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)
lines = raw.splitlines\(\)
domains = []
for line in lines:
    line = line.strip\(\)
    if line.startswith\('0.0.0.0 '\):
        parts = line.split\(\)
        if len\(parts\) >= 2:
            domain = parts[1]
            if domain != '0.0.0.0' and not domain.startswith\('localhost'\):
                domains.append\(domain\)

out_path = 'android/app/src/main/assets/blocklist.txt'
with open\(out_path, 'w', newline='\\n'\) as f:
    for d in domains:
        f.write\(d + '\\n'\)

print\(f'Written {len\(domains\)} domains to {out_path}'\)

# Verify no ad/tracker domains
test_domains = ['taboola.com', 'doubleclick.net', 'googlesyndication.com', 'googleadservices.com', 'facebook.com', 'google-analytics.com', 'mixpanel.com']
domain_set = set\(domains\)
for td in test_domains:
    found = td in domain_set
    print\(f'  {td}: {\\"FOUND \(BAD\)\\" if found else \\"not found \(good\)\\"}'\)

# Show first 10 domains
print\('First 10 domains:'\)
for d in domains[:10]:
    print\(f'  {d}'\)
" 2>&1)
